original_semantics: Root ip inclusive, op exclusive, fr converts frames to seconds.
purelottie_model: LottieAnimation decodes fr/ip/op/w/h/layers/assets.
purelottie_import: ImportContext duration uses (op - ip) / fr.
required_validation: Unit tests for op exclusivity and source frame selection.

original_semantics: Root composition defines viewport and clips to w x h.
purelottie_model: width and height decoded.
purelottie_import: Root layer bounds and masksToBounds set.
required_validation: Pixel test with content outside bounds.

original_semantics: Lottie lists top layer first; compositor draws bottom to top.
purelottie_model: LottieLayer preserves input order; LottieLayerGraphEvaluator emits back-to-front graph records and render-order ordinals.
purelottie_import: RenderIR carries the layer graph and still emits backend nodes separately.
required_validation: Layer graph render-order test with overlapping layer order.

original_semantics: Layer visible when ip <= frame < op.
purelottie_model: inPoint and outPoint decoded; LottieLayerGraphEvaluator records the half-open window, selected frame, ordinary-content visibility, and lottie-web/CoreAnimation boundary notes.
purelottie_import: visibilityWindow gates opacity in seconds until lowering consumes graph timing directly.
required_validation: Boundary tests at ip, op - 1, and op, including op exclusivity.

original_semantics: hd hides normal rendering but hidden layers can contribute as parents or mattes.
purelottie_model: isHidden decoded; layer graph classifies hiddenParent, hiddenMatteSource, and skippedHidden separately.
purelottie_import: Binding preserves hidden parent/matte references before normal rendering skips hidden layers.
required_validation: Parent and matte fixtures where hidden source is semantically active.

original_semantics: Child CTM = CTM(parent) * Transform(child), transitively.
purelottie_model: parent and index decoded; LottieTransformEvaluator.worldTransform composes child-local row-vector matrices with parent-local matrices and records each parent's component traces, matrix convention, matrix, and operations in parentChain.
purelottie_import: Wraps child in parent holder layers.
required_validation: Matrix oracle tests for parent chains, parent-chain component trace, and lottie-web point application.

original_semantics: Apply -anchor, scale, skew, rotation, position.
purelottie_model: Anchor, position including split z, scale, rotation, opacity decoded; LottieTransformEvaluator emits source-frame row-vector matrices with authored initial values, evaluated values, normalized matrix operands, operation traces, parent chains, and lottie-web point application.
purelottie_import: Importer consumes evaluated transform state for anchor, position, z, scale, and rotation before assigning PureLayer fields; animated components still lower to PureLayer key paths.
target: Layer anchorPoint, anchorPointZ, position, zPosition, transform, and animations
required_validation: Matrix comparison against lottie-web for static, animated, 2D-vector, point-application, and parent-chain transform cases.

original_semantics: sk and sa skew around axis between scale and rotation.
corpus_evidence: 136 layer sk; 137 layer sa; 23555 shape sk/sa
purelottie_model: Layer sk/sa decoded; transform evaluator emits structured unsupported-skew diagnostics; shape transform skew remains a gap.
purelottie_import: Default validation rejects/report-blocks skew before lowering; importer does not silently lower it.
required_validation: Layer model fields, semantic diagnostic tests, and shape skew model/report work.

original_semantics: rx/ry/rz/or produce 3D orientation.
purelottie_model: Layer ddd, rx, ry, rz, and or decoded; transform evaluator emits structured unsupported-3D diagnostics.
purelottie_import: Default validation rejects/report-blocks 3D transforms before lowering; importer does not silently lower them.
required_validation: Model fields, semantic diagnostic tests, and PureLayer 2.5D lowering fixtures.

original_semantics: ao rotates layer along motion path tangent.
purelottie_model: autoOrient decoded; transform evaluator emits structured unsupported-auto-orient diagnostics.
purelottie_import: Default validation rejects/report-blocks auto-orient before lowering.
required_validation: Motion-path fixture with tangent orientation.

original_semantics: bm maps to CSS compositing blend modes.
corpus_evidence: 14621 layer bm plus shape bm keys
purelottie_model: Layer bm and fill/stroke style bm are decoded as authored compositing facts.
purelottie_import: Non-zero layer/fill/stroke blend modes are reported during RenderIR-to-PureLayer lowering with backend capability evidence.
required_validation: Blend-mode fixtures and ImportReport assertions for layer and style terms.

original_semantics: ty 1 solid rectangle with sw/sh/sc.
purelottie_model: Solid fields decoded.
purelottie_import: Creates Layer with bounds and backgroundColor.
required_validation: Solid color/bounds pixel test.

original_semantics: ty 3 transform carrier without pixels.
purelottie_model: Decoded as null.
purelottie_import: Creates transparent layer.
required_validation: Null parent matrix tests.

original_semantics: ty 0 instantiates asset layers with local timing/stretch/remap.
purelottie_model: refId,w,h,sr,st,tm and assets decoded; LottieLayerGraphEvaluator records precomp local frame, asset path, child count, size, and time-remap seconds/property trace.
purelottie_import: Builds asset layers; reports non-1 stretch and time remap until lowering consumes local-frame evaluation.
required_validation: Precomp local-frame and time-remap source graph fixtures.

original_semantics: sr changes local time t prime = t / sr - st.
purelottie_model: stretch decoded; LottieEvaluation.localFrame applies st and sr in source-frame space.
purelottie_import: Reports stretch when not 1 but renders unstretched.
required_validation: Expected report and no silent render claim.

original_semantics: tm remaps local time in seconds.
purelottie_model: timeRemap decoded; LottieEvaluation.localFrame evaluates scalar remap and clamps exact op to op - 1 like lottie-web.
purelottie_import: Reports time remap until lowering consumes the evaluator.
required_validation: Model field, evaluator, and ImportReport tests.

original_semantics: Selected source-frame traversal exposes composition, layer, group, style, modifier, matte, precomp, semantic decision, evaluated value, and render node state before rendering.
purelottie_model: LottieCompositionVM runs independently of PureLayer with explicit instructions, frame clock, stacks, JSON paths, source ranges when available, diagnostics, checkpoints, deterministic render node ids, and debugger step/breakpoint/watch APIs.
purelottie_import: Not a backend lowering step; emits trace records and placeholder render nodes for future RenderIR/PureLayer lowering.
required_validation: Swift Testing coverage for readable debug traces, fast traces, JSON paths, modifiers, masks, precomps, skipped layers, render ids, checkpoints, step into/over/out/back, breakpoints, and watches.

original_semantics: Selected source frame exposes graph participation before backend nodes exist: visible content, transform carriers, precomp boundaries, hidden parents, matte sources, skipped hidden layers, skipped frame-window layers, masks, mattes, and local frames.
purelottie_model: LottieLayerGraphEvaluator emits LottieLayerGraphTrace with frame-window reference semantics, per-layer participation, render order, timing, parent chain, mask/matte source-target paths, precomp local frame, and diagnostics.
purelottie_import: LottieRenderFrame.layerGraph carries the trace for lowerers and oracle dumps.
required_validation: Swift Testing coverage for render order, op exclusivity, hidden parent, precomp time remap, mask diagnostics, matte diagnostics, and Codable round trip.

original_semantics: Selected source frame becomes backend-ready semantic IR before PureLayer/PureDraw object creation.
purelottie_model: LottieRenderIRBuilder emits LottieRenderFrame from LottieEvaluation without importing PureLayer; shape geometry/style/masks/trims are evaluated and retain provenance; LottieRenderFrame carries layerGraph.
purelottie_import: LottieRenderIRLowerer consumes RenderIR only, assigns evaluated values to PureLayer, and reports backend gaps with structured evidence containing owner, fixture, source frame, Lottie/JSON path, source range when available, VM trace, RenderIR node/term, layer graph, and oracle artifact links; the checked-in lowering-gate report records 31 fixtures, 94 selected frames, 0 exclusions, and 45 backend findings.
target: Layer, ShapeLayer, PureDraw Path, and backend-gap diagnostics
required_validation: Swift Testing coverage for PureLayer-free RenderIR emission, evaluated-value lowering, layer graph facts, exact source-path gap reports, backend owner evidence, intentional approximation evidence, and lowering-gate/report.json corpus snapshots.

original_semantics: Reference frames and numeric source intent come from pinned lottie-web behavior; pixel comparison is gated on semantic eligibility and numeric intent.
corpus_evidence: 31 curated oracle fixtures plus 857 raw corpus files available for expansion.
purelottie_model: LottieValidator decides eligibility; LottieRenderIRBuilder supplies trace context per selected source frame; committed purelottie.lottie-web-intent traces compare browser matrices, path counts, opacity, direct translation facts, and selected style/geometry facts to PureLottie source facts.
purelottie_import: LottieFrameDump emits PureLayer PNGs plus validation/import/RenderIR summaries and per-frame RenderIR backend evidence; Tools/LottieOracle renders pinned lottie-web PNGs, extracts numeric intent JSON, writes comparison reports, and regenerates the curated corpus with npm --prefix Tools/LottieOracle run build-corpus.
target: External browser harness, lottie-web numeric trace, PNG diff, semantic trace artifacts, backend evidence artifacts, curated fixture manifest, checked-in lowering-gate report
required_validation: Node harness tests pin every committed trace and coverage family; Swift corpus tests decode all 31 fixtures and snapshots; selected-frame rationale, validation gate, lowering-gate snapshot, mismatch artifacts, RenderIR traces, and backend evidence eligibility blocking.

original_semantics: Every observed corpus field is classified before a fixture can influence conformance claims.
corpus_evidence: 857 files; 675 unique payloads; source/license counts pinned.
purelottie_model: Test ledger classifies observed fields as lowered, approximated, reported, metadata, or gap.
purelottie_import: Fixture eligibility is derived conservatively from field classifications before visual oracle use.
target: Corpus gate and conformance matrix vocabulary
required_validation: CorpusSemanticLedgerTests fail on unclassified fields, count drift, missing licenses, status-vocabulary drift, and report eligibility reasons.

original_semantics: ty 2 references image asset.
purelottie_model: Type known; image asset payload not modeled.
purelottie_import: Reports layer type 2.
required_validation: Report includes asset/layer path.

original_semantics: ty 5 text document and animators.
purelottie_model: Type known; text payload not modeled.
purelottie_import: Reports layer type 5.
required_validation: Report includes text layer path.

original_semantics: Masks combine layer content by mode, opacity, inversion, and path.
purelottie_model: mode/path/opacity/inversion decoded; layer graph records mask source path, target layer path, opacity, path payload, and mode/inversion diagnostics.
purelottie_import: Supports one non-inverted additive mask; reports others/approximations.
required_validation: Per-mode graph fixtures plus backend report tests.

original_semantics: tt/tp/td connect matte layer to target.
purelottie_model: trackMatteType, trackMatteParent, and trackMatteSource decoded; layer graph resolves implicit/explicit source path, target path, source JSON path, and hidden matte source participation.
purelottie_import: Binding resolves matte edges and reports unsupported matte lowering with source path/range.
required_validation: Source graph tests for alpha matte edges, hidden matte source participation, and source-target diagnostics; lowering tests for backend reports.

original_semantics: Shape arrays are scoped programs; styles/modifiers apply to preceding shapes.
purelottie_model: Item arrays preserved; LottieShapeProgram exposes style runs and geometry fragments.
purelottie_import: Semantic program preserves reverse walk; DrawingProgram lowers it to PureLayer.
required_validation: Semantic program and DrawingProgram golden tests against lottie-web examples.

original_semantics: Groups scope transforms/styles/modifiers; opacity is atomic.
purelottie_model: items decoded; LottieShapeProgram keeps group boundary, transform, opacity, and compositing mode.
purelottie_import: Recurses; static opacity transparency layer; animated opacity reported.
required_validation: Group opacity compositing tests.

original_semantics: Shape transform affects geometry and style transforms; skew supported by spec.
purelottie_model: anchor/position/scale/rotation/opacity decoded; LottieTransformEvaluator.groupTransform emits the same source-frame matrix and operation trace for shape transform paths; skew missing.
purelottie_import: Static baked into path; animated reported; multiple approximated.
required_validation: Transform-order, group-transform path trace, and style-transform fixtures.

original_semantics: sh Bezier vertices/tangents; animated paths morph at frame time.
purelottie_model: Static/keyframed Bezier decoded; d retained as source evidence; source-geometry trace emits vertices, tangents, closure, direction, and cubic bounds.
purelottie_import: Static contour lowered through source-geometry trace; path morph reported.
required_validation: Morph tests plus raw vertex preservation source-geometry tests.

original_semantics: rc centered rectangle with lottie-web roundness/direction branch.
purelottie_model: position/size/roundness/direction decoded; source-geometry trace expands right-edge start, radius clamp, direction branch, and roundCorner 0.5519.
purelottie_import: Static contour lowered through source-geometry trace; animated geometry reported by static importer.
required_validation: Direction, start, radius clamp, tangent, and RenderIR source-geometry tests.

original_semantics: el centered ellipse with noon start and direction branch.
purelottie_model: position/size/direction decoded; source-geometry trace expands noon-start contour and roundCorner 0.5519.
purelottie_import: Static contour lowered through source-geometry trace; animated geometry reported by static importer.
required_validation: Noon-start, direction, bounds, and trim-order fixtures.

original_semantics: sr star/polygon geometry.
purelottie_model: sy/pt/p/r/or/os/ir/is/d decoded; source-geometry trace expands polygon/star contours with lottie-web point floor, rotation offset, direction multiplier, and roundness scaling.
purelottie_import: Static contour lowered through source-geometry trace; animated geometry reported by static importer.
required_validation: Polygon/star vertex, point floor, roundness constant, and RenderIR trace tests.

original_semantics: fl style color/opacity/fill rule applies to preceding shapes.
purelottie_model: color/opacity/fillRule decoded.
purelottie_import: Static lowered; animated color/opacity reported.
required_validation: Style-scope and animated color report tests.

original_semantics: st style color/opacity/width/caps/joins/miter/dash/blend.
purelottie_model: color/opacity/width/caps/joins/miter/dash/blend decoded.
purelottie_import: Static color/width lowered; animated style and PureLayer-missing caps/joins/miter/dash/blend reported.
required_validation: Cap/join/dash fixtures; PureLayer #157 before exact lowering.

original_semantics: gf linear/radial gradient fill.
purelottie_model: Unsupported shape type.
purelottie_import: Reports shape type gf.
required_validation: Gradient stop parser and reference tests.

original_semantics: gs gradient stroke.
purelottie_model: Unsupported shape type.
purelottie_import: Reports shape type gs.
required_validation: Gradient stroke fixtures.

original_semantics: tm modifies preceding paths by length with start/end/offset and parallel/sequential mode; lottie-web scales percentages, normalizes offset turns, swaps reversed ranges, rounds to 4 decimals, and samples cubic lengths with 150 points.
purelottie_model: start/end/offset/multiple decoded; LottieSourceTrimEvaluator records path lengths, normalized values, sequence order, selected ranges, generated paths, and named approximations.
purelottie_import: RenderIR carries trim traces; stroke trim still lowers to strokeStart/strokeEnd; sequential mode, offset, and trimmed fills remain reported or approximate backend behavior.
target: Source-intent trim trace first; ShapeLayer strokeStart/strokeEnd as limited backend target
required_validation: Swift Testing coverage for ellipse quadrant, rectangle perimeter, cubic path, wrapped offset, empty, full, reversed, and parallel/sequential trims.

original_semantics: mm boolean path operations.
purelottie_model: Unsupported shape type.
purelottie_import: Reports shape type mm.
required_validation: Boolean geometry fixtures.

original_semantics: rp clones preceding elements with transform/opacity interpolation.
purelottie_model: Unsupported shape type.
purelottie_import: Reports shape type rp.
required_validation: Repeater source fixtures.

original_semantics: rd rounds preceding path corners.
purelottie_model: Unsupported shape type.
purelottie_import: Reports shape type rd.
required_validation: Corner geometry fixtures.

original_semantics: Keyframes use t/s/e/i/o/h, hold outside span, per-component easing, and position to/ti spatial motion paths.
purelottie_model: AnimatedDouble, AnimatedVector, LottieKeyframe; LottieEvaluation emits property traces with source frame, span, timing, spatial arc length, and final value.
purelottie_import: ScalarTimeline still samples PureLayer dimensions separately; exact source-intent traces now precede lowering, and incomplete timing handles or spatial tangents report semantic gaps.
required_validation: Evaluator tests against lottie-web for easing, hold, per-component easing, spatial arc length, trace fields, malformed timing, and malformed spatial diagnostics.

original_semantics: Path keyframes interpolate vertices/tangents.
purelottie_model: AnimatedBezier decodes keyframes.
purelottie_import: Reports path morph and uses initial path.
required_validation: Morph oracle tests before lowering.

original_semantics: slots substitute property values by sid.
purelottie_model: Not decoded.
purelottie_import: Not reported.
required_validation: Slot substitution validator tests.

original_semantics: lottie-web supports effects/expressions; security-sensitive.
purelottie_model: Not decoded.
purelottie_import: Not reported.
required_validation: Detect and report with path.

original_semantics: Metadata usually safe; fonts/chars affect text rendering.
purelottie_model: Mostly not decoded.
purelottie_import: Mostly not reported.
required_validation: Separate harmless metadata from rendering inputs.
